name: Indian Chicken Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Blanched almonds or pecans, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the cream cheese and mayonnaise.
2. Add the chopped cooked chicken, chopped almonds, chutney, salt, and curry powder to the cream cheese mixture.
3. Shape the mixture into walnut-sized balls.
4. Roll each ball in grated coconut.
5. Place the balls on a tray or plate lined with parchment paper.
6. Chill until firm.
Randy Rigg
